categories.analyze: Read + understand vault or external sources
categories.automate: Meta-tools and automation (prompt builders, batch loops)

requiresFlags.vault-structure: Vault has CLAUDE.md + at least one `{num}_{name}/{num}_{name}_index.md`

skills.label: Pulse
skills.description: CEO Pulse — deep vault scan, structured briefing, decision questions, actionable next-session prompts.

skills.label: Brief
skills.description: Creates polished PDF briefs, one-pagers, spec sheets through a structured pipeline: content → design brief → HTML wireframe → WeasyPrint PDF.

skills.label: Synthesise Files
skills.description: Synthesise raw files (transcripts, notes, backlog) into vault modules — categorizes, tags, updates, reweaves neighbors.

skills.label: Log
skills.description: Close work sessions — generate session log, split changes into logical commits, prevent overwriting newer files.

skills.label: Ideas
skills.description: Generates new ideas using 6 triggers (gaps, intersections, analogies, contrarian, scale, subtraction) grounded in your vault context.

skills.label: Reweave
skills.description: Cascade-update stale or disconnected modules. Scans vault for outdated content and automatically refreshes it.

skills.label: Vault Audit
skills.description: Audits vault structure — finds broken links, naming inconsistencies, missing indices, orphaned files. Proposes reorganization plan.

skills.label: Graph
skills.description: Analyzes knowledge graph — orphans, dangling links, clusters, dependency depth, staleness heatmap, cross-domain bridges.

skills.label: Graduate
skills.description: Extracts ideas buried in transcripts and promotes them into standalone permanent modules.

skills.label: Copy
skills.description: Creates brand-aligned copy — ad variants, email templates, pitch blurbs, structured AI prompts, recruitment posts.

skills.label: Learned
skills.description: Turns recent learnings into a polished 'What I Learned' post ready for sharing. Reads session logs and transcripts.

skills.label: Weekly Learnings
skills.description: Compiles the week's insights from session logs, transcripts, and module changes into an operational summary.

skills.label: X Daily
skills.description: Takes X/Twitter posts and threads them into relevant vault modules. Classifies by project, finds related modules.

skills.label: Sync
skills.description: Synchronizes knowledge between modular-context (CEO brain) and a secondary vault. Reads sync contract, detects desync.

skills.label: Playscript
skills.description: Analyzes your knowledge base through the Playscript framework — surfaces strategic angles, untapped opportunities, cross-project synergies.

skills.label: Ralph Prompt
skills.description: Interactive wizard for building structured prompts for the Ralph autonomous loop plugin.

skills.label: Ralph Factory
skills.description: Meta-prompt factory — generates 20 strategic Ralph prompts targeting CEO success factors per run.

skills.label: Overnight
skills.description: Plans and executes chained Ralph loops as one continuous session with a queue file. For overnight batch processing.

skills.label: Tasklist
skills.description: Transforms weekly plan into actionable Claude Code session starters with objective, context files, and deliverables.

skills.label: Skill Creator
skills.description: Interactive guide for creating high-quality Claude Code skills (SKILL.md files). Templates, patterns, validation.

skills.label: WhatsApp Digest
skills.description: Analyze WhatsApp groups — action items, blindspots, vault cross-reference, staleness detection. macOS only.

skills.label: Gmail + G-Suite
skills.description: Full Google Workspace playbook — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides. Inbox sweeps, stale follow-ups, calendar gaps, meeting prep, doc/sheet generation. 25 MCP tools (v1.3.0), multi-account aware.

skills.label: Skills Audit
skills.description: Scan your installed skills, detect eligibility gaps, motivate contribution. Run post-onboarding or quarterly.
